title: What About Us
why_this_song: What About Us by Pink (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: What about all the times you said you had the answers?
What about all the broken happy ever afters?
What about all the plans that ended in disaster?
Oh, what about love? What about trust?

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: we can see in the dark

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ready" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ready" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "plans" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "plans" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We are billions of beautiful hearts
What about love? What about trust?
What about all the broken happy ever afters?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "What About Us" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "What About Us" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "What About Us" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "What About Us" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "What About Us" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "What About Us", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
